gate_approach: Both guides parsed (family is only 2 guides — gate test covers full family)
structural_notes: Both guides use 3-column multiline SP format. No variant needed.
Both use header-line metadata format (page_count=0 cosmetic gap).
MHA has explicit Capstone section with 3 competency bullets.
MPH capstone (Public Health Graduate Capstone) is embedded in AoS, not a separate section.
Both guides have only 1 AoS group — the entire program is one area. Unusual but correct.
Low AoS group count (1) reflects that these programs are tightly focused graduate curricula.
gate_result: PASS — both guides HIGH confidence, 0 anomalies, 0 warnings

recommendation.summary: 2/2 parsed, 2 HIGH, 0 MEDIUM, 0 LOW. Family is fully validated in one pass. No parser changes needed.
recommendation.next_family_rationale: The low-risk graduate tier (graduate_standard, mba, healthcare_grad) is now complete. Next recommended families are teaching_mat (9 guides) and education_bs (4 guides) — both expected to share validated patterns from education_ba (Clinical Experiences, Student Teaching, 2-col SP format). Gate test either MATELED or BSSESB before full rollout.
